scripts.pw:audit:local: npm run build && bash scripts/prepare-playwright-local-app.sh && (PLAYWRIGHT_LOCAL=true NEXTAUTH_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3054 NEXTAUTH_SECRET=playwright-secret-key-0123456789 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3054 PLAYWRIGHT_ADMIN_EMAIL=admin@mcraftr.test PLAYWRIGHT_ADMIN_PASSWORD=AdminPass123! MCRAFTR_ADMIN_USER=admin@mcraftr.test MCRAFTR_ADMIN_PASS=AdminPass123! MCRAFTR_ENC_KEY=0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef DATA_DIR=.playwright/data ALLOW_REGISTRATION=true MCRAFTR_ALLOW_PRIVATE_RCON_HOSTS=true MCRAFTR_DISABLE_RATE_LIMITING=true MCRAFTR_PLAYWRIGHT_BYPASS_AUTH=true REDIS_URL=redis://127.0.0.1:63999 PORT=3054 HOSTNAME=127.0.0.1 node .next/standalone/server.js & SERVER_PID=$!; trap 'kill $SERVER_PID' EXIT; PLAYWRIGHT_LOCAL=true PLAYWRIGHT_DISABLE_WEBSERVER=true PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3054 NEXTAUTH_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3054 PLAYWRIGHT_ADMIN_EMAIL=admin@mcraftr.test PLAYWRIGHT_ADMIN_PASSWORD=AdminPass123! MCRAFTR_ADMIN_USER=admin@mcraftr.test MCRAFTR_ADMIN_PASS=AdminPass123! MCRAFTR_PLAYWRIGHT_BYPASS_AUTH=true playwright test ${PLAYWRIGHT_ARGS:-})
